title: Mini Size 7.5 in Replacement Pestle Only Asian Stlye Spice Cooking Kitchen Granite Rock Grinder Small
description:
About this item
Pestle Only, Not Include Mortar Set, 0.6±0.2 kg
Durability and Strength: Crafted from quality granite, these Thai stone pestles are built to last. Their robust construction makes them perfect for grinding harsh ingredients, ensuring long-term use in the kitchen.
Traditional Craftsmanship: Each pestle is handmade by skilled artisans, reflecting authentic Thai craftsmanship. This traditional approach not only adds beauty but also enhances its performance.
Efficient Grinding and Enhanced Flavor: The stone's natural texture and weight provide a practical grinding experience, helping to release the full flavor potential of your ingredients—good for preparing traditional Thai dishes.
Versatility and Resistance: These stone pestles are versatile and suitable for various cooking tasks. They are also heat-resistant, making them ideal for use with hot ingredients during food preparation.
Timeless Design and Eco-Friendly: These pestles complement any kitchen style with their rustic, natural appearance. Made from eco-conscious materials, they offer a sustainable alternative to synthetic tools.
reviews_5s:
It is fantastic, and the price is right! Nicely finished (no letters on it unlike what the picture suggests), great length and weight, and comes with a cute gift cloth bag.It is a great pestle. It came in a cute bag too:) highly recommend-very good quality and it works great. I love it!Nice weight to help with crushing.i bought it to crush dried eggshells to put into the garden. Also to crush herbsPerfect for the larger mortar I bought for curry paste that did *not* include a pestle! I was using a cheap wooden one and it just wasn’t cutting it. This is definitely sized for a 4 cup+ mortar.Bought as a replacement. Works as expected.Play Video
I am seldom moved to write a glowing review, but this pestle is one for the books!! It's well balanced and nicely shaped and it's just beautiful. It truly was not what I was expecting. I didn't know it came with a pretty storage bag either, so this was a very pleasant bonus!This pestle arrived on time and fits my mortar perfectly. It smashes, pounds, crushes, grinds herbs, spices and seeds just like you would want, if you had a mortar and pestle.It’s twice as heavy than a regular mortar which helps mash things; but can be a slight issue for my elder mother to use. We’re pretty happy with it though.You guys truly go above and beyond! Not only is the pestle just as seen in the picture but it came wrapped in layers and layers of bubble wrap AND a cute little handbag! I mean, wow!! Thank you so much!
